reason: Contains ISIS terminology like 'دولة_الخلافة' (State of Caliphate), reports militant activity against Iraqi forces (Popular Mobilization Forces), uses ISIS administrative division terminology ('Wilayat'/Province), and follows ISIS communication style of reporting attacks
